ksa_text: Ability to diagnose root causes and resolve complex technical issues across system layers, conducting incident analysis and problem remediation.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in developing applications that can log and handle errors, exceptions, and application faults and logging.

nice.top_element_label: Skill in performing root cause analysis

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

Skill in performing root cause analysis
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-A-002 (TF, Ability) maps to Clinical Data Manager scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4456 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: dcwf=0.446, nice=0.444, onet=0.439. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within clinical data management, regulatory compliance, and healthcare analytics.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4456 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA TF-A-002 (TF, composite 0.4456) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of O*NET 15-2051.00 tools/technology section; DCWF technical foundations competencies for analytics work roles does not surface this TF-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4456 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for TF domain content at composite 0.4456 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4456, domain TF. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
